---
species: "Cystoclonium purpureum"
accepted_code: "CYPU"
alternate_codes: ""
diminutive: ""
alternate_diminutives: ""
common_name: "Purple claw weed"
field_id_possible:
  - yes
description: "Bristly, cylindrical fronds, short branches or curly tendrils" # make sure to fill this in!
image: '/header_images/cystoclonium_purpureum.jpg'
image_credit: 'Photo from [Seaweed.ie](https://www.seaweed.ie/descriptions/Cystoclonium_purpureum.php)'
categories:
  - erect red algae
sampling_programs:
    - keen_quad
habitat:
  - intertidal
  - subtidal
mobility:
  - sessile
sampling_region:
  - GOM
catami_code: ""
catami_version: "1.4"
worms_code: "145615"
---


**Other images:** <!-- Other images with attribution -->
<br/>

**Distinguishing features:** 
<!-- size, gross morphology, a key identifier, zonation notes (intertidal or depth) -->
<br/>

**Easily confused species and differentiation:** 

<br/>

**Extended Description:** <!-- Extended description -->
